linkedinCookie.title: LinkedIn Cookie (li_at)
linkedinCookie.description: Value of the li_at cookie from your LinkedIn session. Get it from: DevTools → Application → Cookies → www.linkedin.com → li_at

searchQueries.title: Search queries
searchQueries.description: List of job search terms. Each generates a separate search.

location.title: Location
location.description: City, state or country to filter job listings (e.g. Brazil, United States, Portugal).

remote.title: Remote only
remote.description: When true, filters results to remote jobs only.

datePosted.title: Date posted
datePosted.description: Filter jobs by how recently they were posted.

maxResultsPerQuery.title: Max results per query
maxResultsPerQuery.description: Maximum number of Easy Apply jobs to collect per search query.
